{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ekeri's armored Remnant
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ekeri's armored Remnant]] growled at [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
